arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo's true feelings on Man Utd star Rasmus Hojlund copying celebration
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund threatened to ruffle Cristiano Ronaldo’s feathers after stealing the Man United icon’s celebration and the two come together on the pitch once again on Sunday evening

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo’s net worth dwarfed by billionaire former Man Utd team-mate
